text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a LANE from Taiki... "Next holiday, want to
have a BBQ party?" Ooh, that sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ack, but that's the same day I'm supposed to play
Worldwide Windy at Biko's hero show!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Taiki can be in the hero show too! We'll be World
BBQ Windy! And then we can have a BBQ party
after! ♪
